title: Agamar Resistance
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Agamar}}
The '''Agamar Resistance''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] resistance movement, led by [[B'ante Hatcher]] on [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] during the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The Empire accused the citizens of [[Tondatha]], a small town on Agamar, of being members of the resistance and collaborating with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. To send a message to the population of Agamar, the Empire [[Destruction of Tondatha|destroyed]] Tondatha with an [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]]. The event persuaded survivors, including [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] to join the Resistance.

The Resistance held frequent clandestine meetings, discussing their opposition to the Empire, but most of them found it hard to believe that they could stop the Empire. That changed several months after the attack on Tondatha when [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] visited Agamar in order to persuade the Resistance to formally become part of the Alliance. The Rebels held a rally in an abandoned warehouse attended by around 200 dissidents. Security for the rally was tight, the whole area was shielded, picket [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were deployed and the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] was in orbit of the planet. Mon Mothma delivered a speech carefully edited by [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] to help the resistants decide to join the Alliance. Following the rally, Mon Mothma met with the leaders of the Resistance and several members of the Resistance left Agamar to enter service in the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military]].
